hero.name: Ho Tan Thanh
hero.description: Passionate about coding, building healthcare software, and road trip adventures.

home.about_text: I'm a .NET Developer working in healthcare software in Ho Chi Minh City. Outside of work, I enjoy road trips and exploring new places.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Developer, dreamer, and road trip enthusiast
about.intro: Hi! I'm Thanh — a .NET Fullstack Developer based in Ho Chi Minh City.
about.story_p1: I graduated with a degree in Software Engineering from FPT University in 2023. I started my developer journey at FPT Software as an intern, then worked at QAS where I built healthcare management software for a vaccination chain with over 200 branches.
about.story_p2: Currently, I'm working at Apis Medical, continuing to develop healthcare applications using Blazor Web and .NET. Every day at work is a day to learn something new.
about.philosophy: Code isn't just about writing logic — it's about solving real problems for real people. I always aim to create quality software that is maintainable and delivers practical value.
about.hobbies: When I'm not in front of a screen, you'll find me on a road trip, exploring a new coffee shop, or diving into new technologies. I believe real-world experiences make me a better developer.
